description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy design. The front facade features a small balcony above the main entrance, French doors, and large windows, providing ample natural light. A tree and outdoor seating area with a table and chairs are situated in front, enhancing the residential feel. The side and rear walls are mostly plain, with a few windows and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a functional, minimalist aesthetic. The exterior is finished in white, with wooden accents visible on the balcony and interior floors. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or brick, with glass windows and wooden details.
description: A modern, two-story urban house with a flat roof, white exterior, balcony, and large windows. Features a front outdoor seating area with a tree and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, French doors, large windows, and outdoor seating area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly plain white wall, a few windows, and the tree and seating area visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying several windows and a simple, unadorned white wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window opening, balcony visible, and the tree and seating area to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and French doors on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, French doors, a small balcony above, and an outdoor seating area with a tree.
